# Summit Fence & Deck Co.

> Custom fencing and decks in Guelph, Ontario. Cedar fences, composite decks, pergolas, and gates — backed by a 5-year structural warranty.

## Services
- Cedar Fencing: Western Red Cedar privacy and semi-privacy fences, custom heights and styles
- Composite Decks: Low-maintenance composite decking (TimberTech, Trex), multi-level designs
- Aluminum & Ornamental Fencing: Powder-coated aluminum for pool enclosures and decorative boundaries
- Pergolas & Shade Structures: Cedar and aluminum pergolas, louvred roofs, privacy walls
- Gates & Access: Custom driveway gates, garden gates, automated gate systems

## Service Area
Guelph, Kitchener, Waterloo, Cambridge, and surrounding Wellington County, Ontario, Canada

## Contact
- Phone: (519) 555-0147

- Website: https://summitfencedeck.ca
